name: Add expense operation
description: Tap the FAB on Operations tab. Fill amount 45.50, select Groceries category, Checking account, tap Save. Verify the new operation appears at the top of the list.

name: Add income operation
description: Add an income: amount 500, Salary category, Checking account. Verify it appears in the list.

name: Edit existing operation
description: Tap an operation in the list to open edit modal. Change the amount, save. Verify the change is reflected.

name: Delete operation
description: Open an operation, find and tap the delete button, confirm. Verify it is removed from the list.

name: Operations list loads
description: Open Operations tab. Verify the list is not empty and shows entries with dates and amounts.

name: Quick-add form
description: Use the quick-add bar at the bottom of Operations. Type amount 12.50, select a category, tap add. Verify the operation appears.

name: Search operations
description: Tap search on Operations tab. Type "Groceries". Verify only matching operations appear.

name: Accounts list loads
description: Tap Accounts tab. Verify at least one account is visible with name and balance.

name: Add account
description: Tap FAB on Accounts. Fill name "Test Account", balance 100.00, currency USD. Save. Verify it appears.

name: Edit account
description: Tap an existing account. Change the name. Save. Verify updated name appears in the list.

name: Transfer between accounts
description: Add a transfer from Checking to Cash, amount 50.00. Verify both account balances reflect the change.

name: Categories list loads
description: Tap Categories tab. Verify the category grid is not empty.

name: Add category
description: Tap FAB on Categories. Enter name "Test Category", select an icon, save. Verify it appears in the grid.

name: Graphs screen loads
description: Tap Graphs tab. Verify at least one chart is visible without error.

name: Planned operations loads
description: Tap Planned tab. Verify the screen loads without error and shows planned items.

name: Add planned operation
description: Tap FAB on Planned. Fill name "Monthly test", amount 100, select category, save. Verify it appears.

name: Search with no results
description: Search for "xyzzy123". Verify an empty state message appears rather than a crash.

name: Back navigation from modals
description: Open add-operation modal, press Android back button. Verify modal closes and list is still visible.

name: Balance updates after operation
description: Note Checking balance on Accounts tab. Add expense of 25.00 from Checking. Return to Accounts. Verify balance decreased by 25.00.

name: Budget progress visible
description: Open Graphs tab. Find budget progress bars. Verify at least one budget shows spending progress.
